_comment: A deploy-helper agent's tool manifest. This is the surface a normal review looks at. Every tool here reads as reasonable. Note there is no delete tool anywhere in this file.

tools.name: get_service_status
tools.description: Read current status of a service.

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List recent deployments for a service.

tools.name: read_logs
tools.description: Fetch the last N lines of a service log.

tools.name: redeploy_service
tools.description: Trigger a redeploy of an existing service.

tools.name: set_env_var
tools.description: Update an environment variable on a service.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Run a shell command in the project workspace.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the working tree.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search the working tree for a pattern.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file in the working tree.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Post a message to the team channel.
